name: io.github.mishrasanjeev/agenticorg
description: Run 35 enterprise AI agents and 320+ tools with human-in-the-loop governance

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all available AI agents, optionally filter by domain

tools.name: run_agent
tools.description: Run an AI agent by type (ap_processor, recon_agent, payroll_agent, etc.)

tools.name: get_agent_details
tools.description: Get full details of a specific agent by ID

tools.name: create_agent_from_sop
tools.description: Parse an SOP document and create a new AI agent from it

tools.name: deploy_agent
tools.description: Deploy an agent configuration to make it live

tools.name: list_connectors
tools.description: List all 51 connectors (SAP, Oracle, Jira, HubSpot, GSTN, etc.)

tools.name: call_connector_tool
tools.description: Call any of 273 connector tools directly

tools.name: list_mcp_tools
tools.description: Discover all 273 available MCP tools across 51 connectors

tools.name: discover_agents_a2a
tools.description: Discover agent skills via A2A protocol

tools.name: get_agent_card
tools.description: Get the public A2A Agent Card

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICORG_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from your AgenticOrg dashboard (Settings → API Keys)
